brand-story-img.query: Our Story Made slowly, worn for years. Velmora began with a single idea: that demi-fine jewelry could feel as considered as fine jewelry, at a price you could choose often. Every piece is hand-finished by a small workshop of artisans, plated in 18K gold over a hypoallergenic base, and meant to live with you — not in a box. jewelry artisan at workbench warm light

about-detail-img.query: The studio We are a small studio of seven. Our workshop sits in a converted print house in Copenhagen, with tall windows and quiet light. Every piece is finished by hand — polished, set, checked, and packed by one of us, often with a cup of coffee going cold beside us. close up polishing gold ring by hand
